SELECT str, regexp_full_match(str, '(an)') AS match FROM test_strings;
SELECT str, regexp_full_match(str, 'a(b|n)') AS match FROM (SELECT str FROM test_strings WHERE str LIKE 'an%') AS subquery;
SELECT str, regexp_full_match(str, '^a.*a$') AS match FROM test_strings;
SELECT str, regexp_full_match(str, '^[ab]+$') AS match FROM test_strings WHERE str NOT LIKE 'abc';
SELECT str, regexp_full_match(str, '\b(an)\b') AS match FROM test_strings WHERE str LIKE '%ana%';
SELECT str1, str2, regexp_full_match(CONCAT(str1, str2), '^(an)+$') AS match FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.str <> t2.str;
SELECT str, regexp_full_match(str, '(.*an.*)?') AS match FROM (SELECT str FROM test_strings) AS nested_query;
CREATE TABLE check_results AS SELECT str, regexp_full_match(str, '(ana)$') AS match FROM test_strings WHERE str IS NOT NULL;
